name: whycomputer
description: Control local macOS apps through the bundled whycomputer runtime installer and CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Control local macOS apps via CLI.
interface.longDescription: whycomputer exposes a local macOS automation skill for observing app accessibility trees, taking screenshots, clicking, typing, scrolling, dragging, selecting text, and managing the installed app service. The plugin includes a signed macOS runtime installer for the app and CLI, but not the Swift source code.
